summary:
Implementation plan for three major UI features:
1. Inline Remotion Player preview using @remotion/player to render compositions live in the browser without requiring offline rendering
2. Scene-level selection and enhancement — clickable timeline strip below the video that lets users select a scene and submit refinement prompts scoped to it
3. Prompt history with context chains — job history grouped by parent-child refinement relationships with revision tracking

Also documents fixes already completed this session: port collision fix, MCP bridge registration, and successful pipeline test.
